description: Motion design team for animation token systems, scroll choreography, GPU-accelerated transforms, reduced-motion fallback

coordinator.responsibility: Scope assessment, pipeline orchestration, performance gate management, GC loop control

motion-researcher.responsibility: Audit existing animations, measure paint/composite costs, catalog easing patterns

choreographer.responsibility: Design animation token system, scroll-triggered reveal sequences, transition state diagrams

animator.responsibility: Implement CSS animations/transitions, JS orchestration, IntersectionObserver triggers, rAF coordination

motion-tester.responsibility: Chrome DevTools perf traces, compositor-only verification, FPS measurement, layout thrashing detection, reduced-motion validation

tokens.description: Animation token system: research -> choreography -> animation -> test

component.description: Component animation: research -> choreography -> animation -> test (GC loop)

page.description: Page scroll choreography: research -> choreography -> parallel animations -> test

parallel_fan_out.description: Multiple ANIM tasks execute in parallel for page mode, joined before MTEST

review_fix.description: Animator and motion-tester in Generator-Critic loop
